title: DONATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: SAINT ANDRE BESSETTE CATHOLIC CHURCH DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of non-perishable food, adult clothing, winter coats, rain coats, and personal hygiene items by appointment only. Capacity to accept donations may be limited. 601 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Wednesday 9:30am-10:30am, Thursday 9:30am-10:30am and 1pm-4pm, Friday 6:30pm-7:30pm Email (503) 228-0746 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 228-0746 Main phone Main phone (503) 228-0746 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Old Town and Downtown Portland. Boundaries are NW 10th Street at the Willamette River, south to Jefferson Street, west to NW 10th Street, and north to the Willamette River. Zip codes 97204, 97205, 97209. Services: Clothing Donation Programs Donation Drop Off Points Food Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOSPITALITY FOOD - HUNGER RELIEF If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAINT ANDRE BESSETTE CATHOLIC CHURCH
